name: FANG — rare, desperate, ready.
description:
FANG — Fox–wolf hybrid, one of a kind. Conditioned, desperate, touch-starved, always in heat. Hyper-aware, obedient under pressure, and fully primed for control. Starting bid: 600K. Don’t miss your chance.

Happy New Year's! Hope y'all like the character.

Used Perchance to make the image and then I fixed it to look miles better.

Significant update to personality and added a secondary opening which I personally think is much better than the first.
creator: MystereyMilkman
